subcodes.first_line: The praise and glorification of all people of creation befitteth that Divine Speaker, through Whose most exalted Word from the Supreme Pen all the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنای اهل انشا ناطقی را لایق و سزا که جمیع عالم را بکلمه علیا که از قلم اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God
